title: TeraWulf Inc. (WULF) Reports Q1 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
text: TeraWulf reported a loss of $0.44 per share, significantly worse than the consensus estimate of $0.16 loss, representing a surprise of -169.44% as the company substantially underperformed expectations on earnings. The company posted $34.01 million in quarterly revenues, marginally exceeding analyst estimates by 0.07%. However, this represented a decline from $34.4 million in the year-ago period. Despite the disappointing earnings, WULF shares have added about 109.1% since the beginning of the year versus the S&P 500's gain of 7.2%, demonstrating strong relative market performance. The Zacks consensus estimates a $0.19 loss per share for the coming quarter with revenues of $48.21 million. For the full fiscal year, expectations are for a $0.55 loss per share on $336.92 million in revenues.
